metadata.harness: maintainer-only OpenClerk embedded runtime maturity harness; timeout/stall report after interrupted 100 MB attempts

attempts.name: full-run-with-reopen
attempts.command_reference: mise exec -- go run ./scripts/agent-eval/ockp maturity scale-ladder --tier 100mb --seed 53 --run-root <run-root> --report-name ockp-scale-ladder-100mb
attempts.observed_state: CPU-bound harness process remained active after more than 10 minutes; no reduced report was produced.

attempts.name: skip-reopen-rerun
attempts.command_reference: mise exec -- go run ./scripts/agent-eval/ockp maturity scale-ladder --tier 100mb --seed 53 --run-root <run-root> --report-name ockp-scale-ladder-100mb --skip-reopen
attempts.observed_state: CPU-bound harness process remained active after more than 6 minutes; no reduced report was produced.

checks.boundary: This report records reduced timeout/stall evidence only. Generated corpus content, SQLite databases, process details, and raw run roots remain local-only.

outcomes.name: reduced-report-boundary
outcomes.evidence_posture: neutral artifact references only; raw content and raw logs are not committed
outcomes.details: The timeout report intentionally excludes generated document paths, titles, snippets, doc ids, chunk ids, raw run roots, and machine-absolute paths.

outcomes.name: runtime-scale-100mb
outcomes.evidence_posture: 10 MB completed; 100 MB did not produce a reduced report before manual interruption
outcomes.details: The 100 MB tier needs performance investigation before it can be used as routine release-gate evidence or as justification for a 1 GB run.

follow_up.next_action: Determine whether the stall is projection rebuild cost, FTS indexing overhead, synthetic corpus shape, or harness behavior; then produce a reduced 100 MB report or a decision-quality performance finding.
